response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent workflows and cloud technologies. While his AI-specific experience is not as extensive as the job description requires, his technical leadership, open-source contributions, and recent work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic frameworks make him a promising candidate worth interviewing for further assessment.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure experience with modern languages (TypeScript, Python-adjacent via Node.js) and cloud platforms.
Proven technical leadership and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, aligning with key job technologies like multi-agent systems and RAG architectures.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of dedicated AI/ML production experience; most roles focus on general software development.
No direct mention of vector databases or LLM performance optimization, which are critical for the role.
Limited evidence of designing end-to-end AI evaluation pipelines or observability frameworks for production-grade systems.
